## 🐞 Bug Report

<!-- Please run `pnpm check` and check closed issues before submitting. -->

### Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

### Steps to Reproduce
<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior: -->
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

### Expected Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

### Actual Behavior
<!-- Explain what happened instead. -->

### Environment
- **OS**: [e.g. macOS, Windows, Linux]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17]
- **Node.js**: [e.g. 20.x]
- **React version**: [e.g. 18.2.x]
- **@bug-on/react version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]

### Screenshots / Screen Recording
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or videos to help explain your problem. -->

### Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., specific framework like Next.js or Vite). -->
